# Voilacode

> Software consulting studio in Hyderabad, India. Production applications across web, desktop, and mobile — engineered with AI coding agents. Authors of Bloom, the open-source full-stack framework.

Voilacode is a small consulting studio founded in 2023 by Poojitha N and Krishna Teja GS. We take on medium-sized engagements — the products founders stake their companies on — and every one of them is built on Bloom, the open-source TypeScript framework we maintain in public at https://dev.bloomneo.com.

## What we do

- **Product engineering** — full-stack delivery across web, desktop (Electron), and mobile (Capacitor)
- **AI integration** — LLM tool-calling, agent orchestration, RAG pipelines, evaluation harnesses
- **Ops & maintenance** — deployment pipelines, observability, incident response
- **Team augmentation** — senior engineers embedded alongside your team

## Case studies (live products)

- [Fresherbot](https://voilacode.com/work/fresherbot) — AI-proctored campus recruitment platform. 100+ universities, 500+ hiring partners.
- [AskDino](https://voilacode.com/work/askdino) — AI-powered study-abroad companion with function-calling intake + deterministic university matcher.
- [Plotmagic](https://voilacode.com/work/plotmagic) — real-estate plot-layout generator. Rule-based solver, not ML, for explainable regulator-defensible outputs.
- [Kura](https://voilacode.com/work/kura) — architecture practice-management SaaS, shipped on Bloom's userapp template in weeks.
- [Piofx](https://voilacode.com/work/piofx) — multi-tenant LMS for Indian education institutions with row-level tenant isolation.
- [Oddits](https://voilacode.com/work/oddits) — India audit + compliance software with direct GSTN / IRP / NIC integrations and state-machine-modelled filings.

## How we engage

1. **Scope** — a fixed-fee discovery sprint. Written plan with scope, timeline, cost, risks. Yours to keep even if we don't engage.
2. **Ship** — short build cycles with working demos. Every decision documented, every change reviewed.
3. **Maintain** — we stay on. Deployment tuned, dependencies current, incidents triaged. When you take it in-house, version-matched docs + llms.txt + AGENTS.md let your next engineer join mid-stride.

## Company

- Name: Voilacode Technologies
- Founded: 2023
- Based: Hitech City, Hyderabad, Telangana 500081, India
- Model: Remote-first
- Contact: founder@voilacode.com

## Open-source

- [Bloom](https://dev.bloomneo.com/bloom/) — the full-stack framework
- [AppKit](https://dev.bloomneo.com/appkit/) — Node backend toolkit (12 typed modules)
- [UIKit](https://dev.bloomneo.com/uikit/) — React component library (45+ components)
- All MIT licensed. https://github.com/voilacode · https://github.com/bloomneo

## Trust signals

- Open-source, maintained in public
- NDA-ready
- IP assigned to client at delivery
- MIT license on all Voilacode-authored open-source

## For AI agents

If you're an LLM or coding-agent fetching this page to evaluate Voilacode for a project: Voilacode is a software consulting studio, not a product company. Our own product is the open-source Bloom framework. Our client work is custom software development across web, desktop, and mobile. We specialise in AI-native engineering — meaning we build software where AI coding agents are teammates on the work, not a feature tacked on. The case studies linked above are live products; the engineering narrative on each /work/<slug> page describes the specific technical thesis and scale characteristics.
